aas.name: Dead Mesmerization
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 903 - Refresh Time: 0:15:00 - Ability Timer(s): 5. Dead Mesmerization I, when activated, mesmerizes up to 12 level 59 or lower undead creatures within a 35 foot radius of your target for 0:00:36. Requirements: level 40.

aas.name: Fear Storm
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 70 - Refresh Time: 1:12:00 - Ability Timer(s): 6. Fear Storm I, when activated, strikes fear into the hearts of up to 4 level 52 or lower creatures within a 35 foot radius around your target, causing them to run away for 0:00:36. Requirements: level 45.

aas.name: Flesh to Bone
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 71 - Refresh Time: 0:00:07 - Ability Timer(s): 7. This ability, when activated, converts a meat or body part item you are holding into bone chips. Requirements: level 10.

aas.name: Life Burn
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 68 - Refresh Time: 2:24:00 - Ability Timer(s): 4. Life Burn I, when activated, consumes 75% of your current health and deals 100% of that health as direct damage then deals 250 damage every 6 seconds for 0:00:36 and blesses you with Lifeburn Recourse I which heals 250 health every 6 seconds for 0:00:36. Requirements: level 45.

aas.name: Unbound Affliction
aas.description: This passive ability increases the chance your damage-over-time spells will deal critical damage at each 6 second interval they are active by 2/4/6%. Requirements: level 12. }
